what_was_done: Added DNS seeder infrastructure: configured seed1/2/3.torus.cc in net.cpp, cloned sipa/bitcoin-seeder to contrib/seeder/ configured for TORUS protocol, set up DNS records (NS+glue) on Cloudflare/Namecheap. TORUSd node stopped for update — needs restart.
known_issues: StakeMiner requires vNodes.size() >= 3 to activate - blocks solo/small-network staking
MAX_MONEY set to 200M - needs hard-fork bump before ~2034 (5% annual PoS growth)
Gate 3 blocks git push from Claude - user must push manually
TORUSd node is STOPPED — must restart before seeder deployment
pnSeed hardcoded seed is VPS own IP (circular) - add real peer IPs when network grows
torus-explorer address page limited in v1 - no address index in daemon RPC
torus-explorer dev server uses port 3001 (3000 occupied by toroidal-economy app)
next_steps: Deploy dnsseed binary to 95.111.231.121, open port 53, run seeder
Recompile TORUSd with new net.cpp for distribution
Verify v2.0.3 release CI completes (Windows Qt + macOS + Docker)
Lower vNodes.size() < 3 requirement in miner.cpp:542 to allow staking with fewer peers
torus-explorer: visual QA of responsive hash truncation in browser
torus-explorer: add pagination to blocks list page
